title: tagetes gracilis
intro: Tagetes gracilis, also known as Mexican marigold or dwarf tournesol, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tagetes gracilis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of Tagetes gracilis can be made into teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
